When Jupiter, Mercury, Mars and Saturn move in advance
of Venus, there will be wars among men, serpents and Vidyadharas
(a class of demi-gods) and the winds will raze to the ground all
things standing erect, such as trees and mountains. Friends too will
not remain cordial any longer; Brahmins will not be devoted to
their duties; and the God of rain will not give even a drop of water;
and he will smash the tops of mountains with his thunderbolt.
